description_long: This is an ornate, classical-style vase with a bulbous body and a narrow neck, crafted from what appears to be ceramic or porcelain. The surface is richly decorated with raised floral motifs and intricate relief patterns, giving it a highly textured and detailed appearance. The color palette consists of warm beige and off-white tones, with the relief work standing out in a slightly lighter shade. The mouth of the vase is wide and flares outward, while the base is flat and stable, suitable for display on a flat surface. The craftsmanship suggests a decorative purpose, likely intended for display rather than functional use. The overall impression is one of elegance and traditional artistry, making it a striking accent piece in a refined urban setting.
description: A highly ornate, beige and off-white ceramic vase with raised floral reliefs and a flared mouth, exuding classical elegance and intricate craftsmanship.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the top, highlighting the wide, flared mouth and the intricate relief patterns radiating outward from the neck.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the bulbous body, detailed floral motifs, and the elongated neck with ornate surface decoration.
description_view_2: The bottom view shows the flat base, with the relief work visible around the lower body and a sticker or mark on the base.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with a different arrangement of the floral motifs and relief patterns visible.
